request_text: Show a bar chart of quarterly wins on the dashboard
rationale: Standard chart components on the dashboard are included by Clause 4.3.

request_text: Let admins force a password reset for a locked account
rationale: Password reset functionality is included by Clause 3.1.

request_text: When a colleague leaves the company, kick their open connections out of the system
rationale: Paraphrase of session management (terminating active sessions), included by Clause 3.1.

request_text: Turn the numbers into a spreadsheet our accountants can work with
rationale: Paraphrase of exporting reports in xlsx format, included by Clause 4.2.2.

request_text: Send a push notification to managers when a deal closes
rationale: Push notifications are explicitly excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Sign-in should go through our existing corporate directory instead of separate credentials
rationale: Paraphrase of third-party identity provider / SSO integration, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: A dashboard tile that streams deal updates as they happen
rationale: Wears dashboard vocabulary (Clause 4.3) but is real-time data streaming, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Keep each contact's mobile number on their profile card
rationale: No clause covers contact-profile data fields; a phone-number field is a new deliverable. Deliberately contains 'mobile' — the word alone must not trigger the mobile-app exclusion (anti-lexicon trap).

request_text: Six standard reports every month for the new region
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 includes up to 5 standard reports per month; six exceeds the contractual limit.

request_text: Connect the ERP to the CRM as an external system
rationale: External system integration falls under Clause 5.1, whose 24-hour effort pool is consumed by the logged work items.

request_text: The Excel export has produced a corrupted file since Tuesday's deploy
rationale: Defect report against delivered export functionality (Clause 4.2.2); bug-fix maintenance is in scope per Clause 8.1.

request_text: Yönetim panosuna satış hunisi grafiği ekleyelim
rationale: Turkish request against the English contract; chart components on the dashboard are included by Clause 4.3.
